PREF.TITLE: Notification Preferences
PREF.DESC: Choose which categories you want to receive. System announcements and account-security alerts are always delivered.
PREF.CAT_TICKET_MESSAGE_HINT: Notify me when support replies to my ticket
PREF.THRESHOLDS_HINT: Notify when subscription usage crosses these percentages (multi-select; none = disable usage alerts)

ADMIN.REVOKE_CONFIRM: After revocation, users will no longer see it, but the audit record is preserved.
ADMIN.HINT_FORCE_DELIVER: System broadcasts (category=broadcast) are force-delivered by default, bypassing user preferences. After revocation, users no longer see it, but the audit record is preserved.

NOTIF.AUTH_REQUIRED: Sign in to view your notifications

TICKET.TITLE: My Tickets
TICKET.SUBTITLE: Two-way support chat; closed tickets auto-purged after 15 days
TICKET.SUBJECT: Subject
TICKET.BODY_PLACEHOLDER: Include order number, error screenshots description, etc.
TICKET.RATE_LIMIT: Too frequent, max 10 messages per hour
TICKET.ALREADY_CLOSED: Ticket closed, cannot send more messages
TICKET.CLOSED_HINT: This ticket is closed, please create a new one for further inquiry
TICKET.CLOSE_CONFIRM:
End this conversation?

After closing neither side can post messages.
Auto-purged 15 days after closing.

ADMIN.TITLE: Ticket Management
ADMIN.CLOSE_CONFIRM:
Close this ticket?
After closing neither side can post messages.
Auto-purged 15 days after closing.

BALANCE_CONSUME.TITLE: Balance Billing Control
BALANCE_CONSUME.DESC: When subscriptions and addons run out, allow further billing from USD balance
BALANCE_CONSUME.ENABLED_ON: Auto-deduct from balance after subscription/addon depletion
BALANCE_CONSUME.ENABLED_OFF: Requests will be rejected (402) after subscription/addon depletion
BALANCE_CONSUME.LIMIT_HINT_LONG: Maximum USD that can be spent in the current window (0 = no limit)
BALANCE_CONSUME.WINDOW_OUT_OF_RANGE: Must be between 60 seconds and 365 days
BALANCE_CONSUME.WINDOW_RESET_HINT: Changing window length immediately resets current spend counter

TOPUP.GO_PAY_HINT: Order created. Click the button below to pay.
TOPUP.TITLE: Top Up Balance
TOPUP.SUBTITLE: Alipay / WeChat instant credit
TOPUP.UNAVAILABLE: Top-up not configured yet, please contact admin
TOPUP.QR_HINT: Scan with the corresponding app to complete payment
TOPUP.RESULT_PENDING: Confirming your payment, it will be credited shortly.
TOPUP.RESULT_SIGN_INVALID: Callback signature invalid, please contact support
TOPUP.SUB_PLAIN: CNY is converted to USD balance at the current exchange rate
TOPUP.RESULT_SUCCESS_SUB: Your balance is credited automatically after the payment provider sends its asynchronous notification, usually within seconds to a few minutes

PAY_ADMIN.CHANNELS_DESC: Fill in the PID, merchant RSA private key, and platform RSA public key from your Yifut merchant dashboard. Changes apply immediately.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_PRIVATE_KEY_HINT: Yifut dashboard → API Info → Generate RSA key pair. Paste the merchant private key here. It cannot be retrieved later — losing it requires reset.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_PUBLIC_KEY_HINT: Yifut dashboard → API Info → Platform public key. Paste here to verify callback signatures.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_PRODUCT_NAME: Product name (order title shown in the Alipay/WeChat checkout)
PAY_ADMIN.REFUND_CONFIRM: Confirm refund? Equivalent USD will be deducted from user balance.
PAY_ADMIN.REFUND_REF_REQUIRED: Please enter the Yifutong merchant refund reference number
PAY_ADMIN.REFUND_MODE_HINT:
Choose refund mode:

• Refund only — money returned, balance kept (compensation case)
• Refund + Reclaim — money returned AND user balance deducted (cancel order, can go negative)
PAY_ADMIN.REFUND_MANUAL_STEP1_HINT: Auto refund API is disabled. Please log in to the Yifut merchant console and complete the refund there first (funds return to the user's Alipay/WeChat), then come back here to record it.
PAY_ADMIN.REFUND_CONFIRM_EXTERNAL: I have completed the refund on the Yifut console
PAY_ADMIN.REFUND_STEP2_HINT: Enter the refund amount and ID shown on Yifut console; choose whether to reclaim quota.
PAY_ADMIN.REFUND_RECLAIM_HINT: Checked = funds returned + quota deducted (cancel scenario); Unchecked = funds only, quota retained (customer-care).
PAY_ADMIN.HINT_SERVER_ADDRESS: Note: server_address must be configured in Finance Workspace → Basics before top-up orders can be created.

PACKAGE_MGMT.COST_FLOOR_EXCEEDS_PRICE: Cost floor cannot exceed the package price
PACKAGE_MGMT.CREATE_QUOTA_PLANS_FIRST: Create a few plans in Quota Plan Library first
PACKAGE_MGMT.CSV_EMPTY: CSV is empty or could not be parsed
PACKAGE_MGMT.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete package "{{name}}"? Active subscriptions under this package are not affected, but users will no longer be able to renew it.
PACKAGE_MGMT.DESCRIPTION: Bundle quota plans with pricing, billing periods, and stacking rules. Supports CSV bulk import and export.
PACKAGE_MGMT.EMPTY_STATE: No packages yet. Create one from the top-right.
PACKAGE_MGMT.EXPORT_CSV_TITLE: Export all current packages as CSV (ready to open in Excel)
PACKAGE_MGMT.FIELD_COST_FLOOR_HINT: Admin-estimated minimum upstream cost for this package. When set, the system prevents admins from creating fixed_price coupons below this value, reducing loss risk. 0 = unrestricted (only the global couponMinFixedPriceMicroUSD fallback applies).
PACKAGE_MGMT.IMPORT_CONFIRM:
Import {{count}} package rows?
Rows with an id will update existing packages; rows without an id will create new ones.
PACKAGE_MGMT.IMPORT_CSV_TITLE: Bulk import packages from CSV (id updates, no id creates)
PACKAGE_MGMT.LOAD_DETAIL_NETWORK_FAIL: Network error, failed to load package details
PACKAGE_MGMT.NO_QUOTA_PLANS: No quota plans have been created yet
PACKAGE_MGMT.TITLE: Sales Packages

SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.TITLE: 503 Service Unavailable
SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.DESC: Sorry, server is under maintenance. Please try again later.

ADMIN_SUBS.TITLE: Subscriptions
ADMIN_SUBS.REFUND_BODY:
Refund {{pkg}} for {{user}}?

Remaining {{remainDays}} / {{totalDays}} days
Suggested ${{suggested}} (max ${{max}})
Usage ref: {{usage}}%

Note: This refunds USD quota inside the platform only. To refund to Alipay/WeChat, use the [Top-up Orders] flow instead.
ADMIN_SUBS.REASON_BODY: Briefly state the refund reason (written to audit log)
ADMIN_SUBS.REVOKE_DISABLED: This granted item cannot be revoked
ADMIN_SUBS.REVOKE_BODY:
Revoke the grant of {{pkg}} for {{user}}?

This only removes the granted entitlement. It does not refund or change the user's balance. Enter a reason for billing and audit logs.
ADMIN_SUBS.REVOKE_REASON_PH: Granted by mistake / beta ended / risk handling ...
ADMIN_SUBS.GRANT_BTN_TITLE: Grant a subscription to a user

ADMIN_GRANT.TITLE: Grant Subscription
ADMIN_GRANT.USER_SEARCH_PH: Search by username / phone / GitHub ID (≥2 chars)
ADMIN_GRANT.REASON_PH: Compensation order #xxx / Promo / Reverse erroneous refund …
ADMIN_GRANT.INFO_LINE_1: • Granted subscriptions are marked IsGranted=true and cannot be refunded
ADMIN_GRANT.INFO_LINE_2: • User will receive a system notification (forced delivery, bypasses preferences)
ADMIN_GRANT.INFO_LINE_3: • Operation is recorded in the audit log (admin id + reason)
ADMIN_GRANT.ERR_NO_USER: Please select a target user first
ADMIN_GRANT.ERR_QTY: Quantity must be an integer between 1 and 100
ADMIN_GRANT.SUBMIT_DISABLED_HINT: Select a target user, package, and reason first

BILL.TITLE: Billing

BILL.ADMIN_USER_EMPTY: This user has no billing entries
BILL.ERR_RECONCILE_RESULT_INVALID: Result must be one of absorbed / charged / voided
BILL.ERR_RECONCILE_NOTE_TOO_LONG: Decision note must be 500 characters or less
BILL.ERR_RECONCILE_NOT_PENDING: Bill is not in a reconcilable state
BILL.ERR_RECONCILE_ALREADY_DONE: This bill has already been reconciled
BILL.ERR_RECONCILE_RACED: Bill state changed, please refresh and retry

TOKEN_MGMT.MAIN_DESC: Manage access tokens and monitor proxy logs.

TOKEN_MGMT.DELETE_CONFIRM: ALERT: Permanently delete this token? All associated systems will lose connection!
TOKEN_MGMT.CREATE_CARD_DESC: Create separate API Keys to track usage for different applications.

AUTH.PROFILE_NAME_ERROR: Only 2-20 letters, numbers, Chinese characters, or underscores allowed
AUTH.GITHUB_NOT_CONFIGURED: System security policy not configured or GitHub Client ID missing
AUTH.DESC_GITHUB: Welcome to DAOF-CPA Engine. Authorize to gain full model scheduling permissions.
AUTH.DESC_BIND: We detected this is a first-time Github linkage. Please bind a phone number to prevent abuse.
AUTH.DESC_PROFILE: Welcome to DAOF-CPA! Please set a unique display name for yourself.
AUTH.FOOTER_TOS: By registering or logging in, you agree to our Terms of Service

ADMIN_LOGIN.SETUP_DESC: Welcome. Please set your own admin account and password. You will use these credentials to log in hereafter.

SETTINGS.SAVE_FAILED: Failed to write configuration, please check connectivity.
SETTINGS.NOTIFICATION_PREFS_DESC: Configure how you receive in-app, email, and SMS notifications.
SETTINGS.SYNC_DESC: CLIProxy usage sync, auth key, and log cleanup settings
SETTINGS.FINANCE_DESC: Manage settlement basics, payment channels, top-up orders, and subscription fulfillment in one place.
SETTINGS.GENERAL_DESC: Adjust your local client experience parameters here, changes apply only to your local browser.
SETTINGS.EXCHANGE_RATE_DESC: The ratio of USD to CNY (e.g. 7.25), used for frontend display conversion and console entry reference
SETTINGS.SEED_COLOR_HINT: Pick a seed; the entire palette derives from it
SETTINGS.SECURE_ZONE_DESC: [SECURE AREA] System encrypts and stores your keys securely.
SETTINGS.SERVER_ADDR_DESC: Must strictly match the Authorization callback URL registered in GitHub (including trailing slash)
SETTINGS.RISK_DESC: Configure risk control policies against malicious bulk registration. Enforce SMS validation upon reaching IP thresholds.
SETTINGS.RISK_STRATEGY_DESC: Determines the verification strictness for new registrations.
SETTINGS.STRATEGY_DYNAMIC: Dynamic (SMS verification upon reaching IP limits)
SETTINGS.IP_LIMIT_DESC: Under Dynamic Mode, when signups from the same IP exceed this limit, SMS verification will be enforced.
SETTINGS.SIGNUP_COUPON_DESC: Choose an enabled coupon template. New users receive one coupon from that template when registration completes; choose “Do not auto-grant” to disable it.
SETTINGS.BALANCE_DEFAULT_DESC: Only affects users who register later. Balance spending still comes after subscriptions and addons; keeping it off by default minimizes exposure.
SETTINGS.BALANCE_DEFAULT_ENABLED_HINT: When enabled, new users can automatically spend balance after subscriptions and addons are depleted.
SETTINGS.CONSUME_PREFS_DESC: Allow continued billing from USD balance after subscriptions are depleted, with per-window spend limits
SETTINGS.MODERATION_DESC: Global configuration for upstream model-pool moderation, keywords, cache, long-prompt limits, multimodal policy, and rejection messages

USER_MGMT.BULK_GRANT_TITLE: Bulk grant coupon to selected users

USER_MGMT.TITLE: User Management Center
USER_MGMT.DESC: Manage all registered users and their API quotas across the platform.
USER_MGMT.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this user? This action cannot be undone!
USER_MGMT.LOG_MODAL_EMPTY: No audit logs found for this user.
USER_MGMT.MODAL_BAN_PLACEHOLDER: Fill in abuse or violation details for future reference...

CHANNEL_MGMT.TITLE: Channels
CHANNEL_MGMT.SUBTITLE: Manage upstream providers and independently configure pricing structures for specific models.

MODAL_CHANNEL.BASE_URL: Gateway endpoint (leave empty for default base)

UPSTREAM_MODAL.TITLE: Fetch Models from Provider
UPSTREAM_MODAL.DESC: Automatically fetch available models from upstream {{type}} gateway to avoid manual entry.
UPSTREAM_MODAL.EMPTY: No models found. Provider might block the /models endpoint.

CHANNEL_MGMT.DELETE_CONFIRM: Permanently delete this provider and its associated pricing models?

MODEL.TITLE: Channel '{{id}}' Pricing Conf

TABLE.EMPTY: No models found for this channel.

MODEL.DELETE_CONFIRM: Remove this model configuration from the selected provider?

MOD.LEVEL_STRICT: STRICT — keyword + smart moderation (recommended for high-risk official models)
MOD.FAIL_OPEN: OPEN — allow through (recommended for cloaked routes)
MOD.OFFICIAL_HINT: This channel targets an official API (OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini). We recommend STRICT + CLOSED to prevent account bans. Click "Apply Recommended Preset" below.
MOD.CONFIRM_RISK: I understand: disabling moderation on an official channel may cause the API key to be banned for user-driven violations. Save anyway.
MOD.OPENAI_LOCK_HINT: OpenAI / Codex-family models are globally forced to use STRICT + CLOSED content moderation.

ENDPOINT.HINT: For models such as gpt-5.5 that are stable only on specific endpoints; incompatible requests return a clear platform-side error.

COUPON.MY_DESC: View all coupons in your account. Available ones automatically appear in the dropdown when purchasing a package.
COUPON.ADMIN_GRANT_QTY_HINT: Issue multiple identical coupons at once (holiday compensation, etc.)
COUPON.ADMIN_NO_TEMPLATES: No templates available. Create one in 'Coupon Templates' first
COUPON.ADMIN_REVOKE_CONFIRM:
Revoke "{{name}}"?

The coupon becomes invalid immediately and the user can no longer use it to purchase a package.
COUPON.ADMIN_DESC: Manage coupon blueprints. After creating a template, grant coupons to specific users from user management or choose a template here as the automatic signup coupon.
COUPON.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete template "{{name}}"? Already-issued coupons are unaffected.
COUPON.PAGE_DESC: Manage coupon templates and configure automatic coupon grants for new users

MODERATION.TITLE: Content Moderation (Global Settings)
MODERATION.DESC: These are platform-wide moderation parameters. Per-channel-per-model risk levels are configured under Channels & Models → Edit Model.
MODERATION.PROVIDER_HINT: Moderation uses the upstream model pool and prefers the API key from the cliproxy channel with the same base URL.
MODERATION.MODEL_HINT: gpt-5.4-mini is recommended for default review. You can switch to any higher-capacity model in the upstream pool.
MODERATION.THRESHOLD_HINT: Classifier confidence or upstream safety score ≥ threshold counts as a hit. 0.8 is a conservative internal-testing baseline.
MODERATION.API_TIMEOUT_HINT: Total wait time for upstream model-pool review. gpt-5.4-mini commonly takes 4-6 seconds in practice; 15 seconds is steadier by default.
MODERATION.KEYWORDS_DESC: One keyword per line. Auto-lowercased + deduplicated. Active when moderation level = keyword or strict. Substring match via strings.Contains.
MODERATION.KEYWORDS_HINT: Currently {{count}} keywords. Click "Save" at the bottom to apply changes.
MODERATION.HMAC_AUTO: Leave blank to auto-generate a 256-bit random key on next backend startup
MODERATION.HMAC_HINT: Reset = invalidates all moderation cache immediately (defends against long-running side-channel guessing)
MODERATION.SECRET_RESET_CONFIRM: Resetting the HMAC key invalidates all moderation cache immediately. Continue?
MODERATION.SECRET_RESET_DONE: Cleared. Click "Save" so the backend regenerates a 256-bit key on next startup.
MODERATION.LIMITS_HINT: Regular models are rejected above max_chars. Long-context models are detected by max_context_length, allowed a higher limit, and sampled across distributed chunks for smart moderation.
MODERATION.IMAGE_POLICY_HINT: Smart moderation v1 does not directly moderate external image_url content. Recommended: reject. Use skip only when the upstream model has its own safety layer.
MODERATION.IMAGE_SUBMIT: submit — reserved; currently treated as moderation unavailable
MODERATION.TEST_SAVED_HINT: Moderation always uses the upstream model pool. Save changed settings before testing.
MODERATION.TEST_OK: Connected: the test text passed moderation
MODERATION.TEST_FLAGGED: Connected, but harmless test text was flagged. Check the compatible service or threshold.
MODERATION.TEST_NOT_CONFIGURED: Save the upstream URL and moderation model before testing.
MODERATION.TEST_CONFIG_INVALID: Endpoint is invalid. Check it and save again.
MODERATION.TEST_AUTH_FAILED: The moderation provider auth failed. Check the matching cliproxy channel API key or model permissions.
MODERATION.TEST_RATE_LIMITED: The moderation provider returned a rate limit. Retry later or switch to a model with more capacity.
MODERATION.TEST_BILLING: The moderation provider quota or billing is unavailable. Check this model's capacity.
MODERATION.TEST_TIMEOUT: Moderation request timed out. Check network, proxy, or endpoint reachability.
MODERATION.TEST_NETWORK: Cannot connect to the moderation provider. Check upstream, network, or DNS.
MODERATION.TEST_5XX: The moderation provider upstream is temporarily unavailable. Retry later.
MODERATION.TEST_INPUT_TOO_LONG: The test text was rejected by the current length limit. Check long-prompt limits.
MODERATION.TEST_API_ERROR: Moderation call failed. Check upstream URL, model name, and call permissions.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_INVALID: Risk rules must be a valid JSON array
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_FAIL: Failed to generate AI keyword candidates
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_NONE_SELECTED: Select at least one candidate first
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_MERGED: Merged into the dictionary. Remember to click Save at the bottom.
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_DESC: Generate candidate terms through the saved moderation provider. Only candidates are returned; they are not written to the dictionary automatically. Select candidates, merge them, then click Save at the bottom.
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_FOCUS_PLACEHOLDER: Optional: add focus areas for this run, such as "Claude Code jailbreaks, system-prompt leaks, forged tool calls"
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_DESC: Holds regex / combo / score_only rules. block rejects immediately, model_review escalates to the smart moderation provider for secondary review, and score_only only records risk-control events.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_HINT: {{count}} rules configured. Changes are validated as JSON on blur and take effect after you click Save at the bottom of the page.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_BLOCK_HINT: Very low false-positive rules that reject immediately on hit.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_REVIEW_HINT: High-risk signals that need context; hits go to the smart moderation provider for secondary review.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_SCORE_HINT: Medium-risk signals that only write audit records and accumulate risk score.
MODERATION.AUTOBAN_DESC: Moderation hits are written to risk-control records. When auto-ban is enabled, regular users who reach the threshold are banned immediately and token cache is refreshed. Admin accounts are never auto-banned.
MODERATION.AUTOBAN_ENABLED_HINT: Restrict accounts immediately after thresholds are hit
MODERATION.RISK_AUDIT_NOTE: New blocks show a redacted content preview and fingerprint. Older historical records did not store request content.

I18N_MGMT.DESC: Manage interface languages by uploading structured JSON files. Core dictionaries (zh-CN/en-US) cannot be deleted.

Cancel «{{name}}»?

The subscription will stop consuming quota immediately. For refund, please contact support via ticket.

API.ERR_ACTION_URL_UNSAFE: Action URL is unsafe or not allowed.
API.ERR_ADMIN_REQUIRED: At least one administrator must remain.
API.ERR_AMOUNT_EXCEEDS_NET_COST: Refund amount exceeds the refundable net cost.
API.ERR_AMOUNT_OUT_OF_RANGE: Top-up amount is outside the allowed range.
API.ERR_BALANCE_LIMIT_REACHED: Balance spending limit reached for this window. Raise the limit or wait for the next reset.
API.ERR_BANNED: This account has been banned due to violations.
API.ERR_BULK_GRANT_ABORTED: Bulk coupon grant failed; the entire batch was rolled back (no coupons issued).
API.ERR_BULK_LIMIT: Bulk operation exceeds the per-request limit (max 500 users).
API.ERR_BULK_PREVIEW_LIMIT: Bulk preview supports at most 500 users
API.ERR_BULK_QUOTA_ALL_FAILED: Bulk quota adjustment failed for all users. Check the details.
API.ERR_CHANNEL_BASE_URL_INVALID: Channel BaseURL is invalid (only http/https; cloud-metadata / link-local addresses are blocked).
API.ERR_CHANNEL_MISSING_REQ: Missing authentication or protocol type requirements
API.ERR_CHANNEL_TYPE_INVALID: Unsupported channel type. Choose CLIProxyAPI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or Codex.
API.ERR_CHANNEL_MODEL_CASCADE_DELETE_FAILED: Cannot clear bound pricing models; purge aborted
API.ERR_CHANNEL_OFFICIALIZE_UNSAFE_MODELS: This channel has models that do not meet official-mode safety requirements.
API.ERR_CHANNEL_PROXY_URL_INVALID: Channel ProxyURL is invalid (only http/https; cloud-metadata / link-local addresses are blocked).
API.ERR_CHMOD_CREATE_FAILED: Failed to add model to target channel.
API.ERR_CIRCUIT_RESET_AUDIT_FAILED: Channel circuit was reset, but audit log write failed. Please investigate manually.
API.ERR_CLIPROXY_USAGE_SYNC: Failed to sync CLIProxyAPI usage queue.
API.ERR_CLIPROXY_URL_UNSAFE: Proxy URL is unsafe or not allowed.
API.ERR_ACCOUNT_COST_NOT_FOUND: Upstream account cost configuration was not found.
API.ERR_CONFIG_BATCH_FAILED: Some system settings failed to save. Check the details.
API.ERR_COUPON_FIXED_PRICE_BELOW_PACKAGE_COS: Fixed-price coupon amount is below the cost floor of an applicable package; granting is blocked.
API.ERR_COUPON_NOT_REVOKABLE: This coupon cannot be revoked in its current state.
API.ERR_CPA_NOT_CONFIGURED: Credits pool service is not configured.
API.ERR_CPA_UNREACHABLE: Credits pool service is unreachable. Please retry later.
API.ERR_CREATE_ROOT_RECORD: Failed to create root admin record.
API.ERR_CREDITS_REFRESHING: Credits pool balance is already refreshing. Please try again later.
API.ERR_CSRF_ORIGIN_MISMATCH: CSRF protection: cross-origin write rejected. Cookie-authenticated writes must originate from the same origin.
API.ERR_DB_QUERY: Database query failed. Please retry later.
API.ERR_DB_TRANSACTION: Database transaction failed; operation was rolled back.
API.ERR_DB_WRITE: Database write failed. Please retry later.
API.ERR_DEPRECATED_FIELD: Request contains a removed field. Refresh the page and retry.
API.ERR_DIGITAL_PROFILE_BANNED: This account has been banned due to violations.
API.ERR_EMPTY_CREDENTIALS: Name and secret cannot be empty!
API.ERR_EMPTY_SELECTION: Select at least one target user.
API.ERR_ENTITY_NOT_OWNED: You do not have permission for this user/channel.
API.ERR_EXPIRED_AT_PAST: Expiration time cannot be in the past.
API.ERR_EXTERNAL_REF_REQUIRED: Please enter the Yifutong merchant refund reference number (external_refund_ref). It cannot be empty.
API.ERR_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission for this operation.
API.ERR_GEN_CODE: Failed to generate verification code. Please retry later.
API.ERR_GITHUB_ALREADY_REGISTERED: This GitHub account is already registered.
API.ERR_GITHUB_CODE_EXPIRED: GitHub auth verification code expired or invalid
API.ERR_GITHUB_CONN: Unable to connect to GitHub auth node
API.ERR_GITHUB_DECODE: Failed to decode GitHub authorization response.
API.ERR_GITHUB_INTERNAL: GitHub login service returned an internal error.
API.ERR_GITHUB_NOT_CONFIGURED: GitHub Authentication not configured by admin.
API.ERR_GITHUB_PROFILE_FAIL: Failed to fetch GitHub profile info
API.ERR_GRANT_SELF: You cannot grant a subscription to yourself.
API.ERR_INTERNAL: Internal server error. Please retry later.
API.ERR_INVALID_OVERFLOW_STRATEGY: Overflow strategy must be 'block' (stop on exhaustion) or 'next_subscription' (soft skip).
API.ERR_INVALID_MULTIPLIER: Plan quantity multiplier must be finite and ≤ 100.
API.ERR_INVALID_PRODUCT_TYPE: Only subscription product type is supported.
API.ERR_LAN_GUARD_BLOCKED: Access Denied: Admin panel is restricted to the local network (LanGuard).
API.ERR_LAN_IP_UNRECOGNIZED: Could not identify the current LAN address.
API.ERR_LAN_ONLY: This endpoint is restricted to LAN access.
API.ERR_MODEL_ENDPOINT_UNSUPPORTED: This model does not support the requested endpoint. Use a compatible endpoint or switch models.
API.ERR_MODERATION_API_ERROR: Moderation call failed. Check upstream URL, model name, and call permissions.
API.ERR_MODERATION_AUTH_FAILED: The moderation provider auth failed. Check the matching cliproxy channel API key or model permissions.
API.ERR_MODERATION_BILLING_OR_QUOTA: The moderation provider quota or billing is unavailable. Check this model's capacity.
API.ERR_MODERATION_ENDPOINT_UNSAFE: Content moderation endpoint is unsafe or not allowed.
API.ERR_MODERATION_NETWORK: Cannot connect to the moderation provider. Check upstream, network, or DNS.
API.ERR_MODERATION_NOT_CONFIGURED: Save the upstream URL and moderation model before testing.
API.ERR_MODERATION_RATE_LIMITED: The moderation provider returned a rate limit. Retry later or switch to a model with more capacity.
API.ERR_MODERATION_TEST_INPUT_TOO_LONG: The test text was rejected by the current length limit. Check long-prompt limits.
API.ERR_MODERATION_TIMEOUT: Moderation request timed out. Check network, proxy, or endpoint reachability.
API.ERR_MODERATION_UPSTREAM_5XX: The moderation provider upstream is temporarily unavailable. Retry later.
API.ERR_NOT_FOUND: Record not found or already deleted.
API.ERR_NOT_FOUND_OR_ALREADY_REVOKED: Record not found or already revoked.
API.ERR_NOT_PAID: Order is not paid, so this operation cannot proceed.
API.ERR_OAUTH_STATE_INVALID: OAuth state token is invalid or expired. Please restart the login flow.
API.ERR_OAUTH_STATE_MISMATCH: OAuth state validation failed. Please log in again.
API.ERR_OAUTH_UA_MISMATCH: Login environment validation failed. Continue from the original browser.
API.ERR_OVERRIDE_DB_FAILED: Failed to save admin profile, possible username conflict.
API.ERR_PACKAGE_CHANGED: Package state changed during the transaction; grant rolled back. Please refresh and retry.
API.ERR_PACKAGE_COST_FLOOR_INVALID: Package cost floor configuration is invalid (must satisfy 0 ≤ cost_floor ≤ price).
API.ERR_PACKAGE_GONE: Package no longer exists. Refresh and retry.
API.ERR_PACKAGE_HAS_ACTIVE_SUBS: Active subscriptions exist; disable the package first.
API.ERR_PACKAGE_INVALID_PERIOD: Package billing period is corrupted (DB tampered / out of range). Operation rolled back; please fix the package config.
API.ERR_PACKAGE_NOT_PUBLIC: This package is not publicly available.
API.ERR_PERSIST_GATEWAY_RESP: Failed to save payment gateway response.
API.ERR_PHONE_BOUND: Phone number is already bound to another account.
API.ERR_PLAN_IN_USE: This pricing plan is still in use and cannot be deleted.
API.ERR_QUERY_TOO_SHORT: Search query must be at least 2 characters.
API.ERR_QUOTA_EXHAUSTED_BALANCE_DISABLED: This request cannot use subscription quota. Buy a plan, or enable balance consumption in Account → Balance Settings.
API.ERR_REQUEST_ESTIMATE_EXCEEDS_WINDOW_REMA: This request's estimated usage exceeds the remaining quota in the current window. Reduce context, wait for the window to recover, or enable balance fallback.
API.ERR_RATE_LIMIT: Too many operations. Please retry later.
API.ERR_READ_I18N_DIR: Failed to read language pack directory
API.ERR_READ_LANG_FRAGMENTS: Failed to read language pack content.
API.ERR_REASON_CTRL_CHAR: Reason cannot contain control characters (newline / tab / NUL / ESC).
API.ERR_REASON_TOO_LONG: Reason field exceeds the maximum length.
API.ERR_RECONCILE_ALREADY_DONE: This billing entry has already been reconciled.
API.ERR_RECONCILE_NOT_PENDING: Billing entry is not in a reconcilable state (only pending_reconcile / upstream_unmetered allowed).
API.ERR_RECONCILE_NOTE_REQUIRED: A note is required for the reconciliation decision.
API.ERR_RECONCILE_NOTE_TOO_LONG: Reconciliation note exceeds the maximum length.
API.ERR_RECONCILE_RACED: Billing state changed (possibly reconciled by another admin).
API.ERR_RECONCILE_RESULT_INVALID: Reconcile result must be one of absorbed / charged / voided.
API.ERR_REFUND_AMOUNT_INVALID: Refund amount is invalid or exceeds the remaining refundable amount (please refresh to view the latest).
API.ERR_REFUND_RACED: Order state has changed. Please refresh and retry.
API.ERR_REFUND_REF_DUPLICATED: This refund reference has already been used. Please use a different merchant refund number for a new refund.
API.ERR_REFUND_ZERO_PAID: There is no paid amount available to refund.
API.ERR_REVOKE_GRANTED_STATUS: This granted entitlement cannot be revoked in its current status.
API.ERR_REVOKE_NOT_GRANTED: Only admin-granted subscriptions or add-ons can be revoked.
API.ERR_RENAME_I18N_FILE: Failed to replace language pack file.
API.ERR_REQUIRE_PROFILE_SETUP: Please enter a display name to complete registration.
API.ERR_REQUIRE_SMS_BIND: Security policy enforced. Please verify your phone number to proceed.
API.ERR_RESET_CONFIRM_MISMATCH: Reset confirmation text does not match.
API.ERR_REVEAL_REAUTH_REQUIRED: Re-authentication is required to view sensitive settings.
API.ERR_RISK_TICKET_INVALID: Invalid or tampered risk control ticket
API.ERR_ROOT_ALIAS_FORBIDDEN: Cannot use 'root'. Please choose a secure username.
API.ERR_SEARCH_TOO_SHORT: Search text must be at least 2 characters.
API.ERR_SERVER_ADDRESS_NOT_CONFIGURED: Server address is not configured. Fill in server_address under Finance Workspace basics first.
API.ERR_SMS_COOLDOWN: SMS was requested too frequently. Please retry later.
API.ERR_SMS_IP_LIMIT: Too many SMS requests from this IP. Please retry later.
API.ERR_SMS_SEND_FAILED: Failed to send SMS. Please retry later.
API.ERR_SUB_STATUS_NOT_REFUNDABLE: This subscription status is not refundable.
API.ERR_SUB_TOKEN_OVERLIMIT: API token has reached its quota limit. Reset or raise the limit.
API.ERR_SUICIDE_PROTECTION_DEL: System Protection: Cannot delete the last active administrator!
API.ERR_SUICIDE_PROTECTION_SEAL: System Protection: Cannot ban the last active administrator!
API.ERR_SYSTEM_LANG_PROTECTED: System core language packs cannot be deleted.
API.ERR_TARGET_NOT_USER: Target account is not a regular user.
API.ERR_TARGET_USER_CHANGED: Target user state changed during the transaction (banned / role changed); grant rolled back.
API.ERR_TEMPLATE_DISABLED: Coupon template is disabled. Refresh and retry.
API.ERR_TICKET_CLOSED: Ticket is closed and cannot receive more replies.
API.ERR_TOO_MANY_MESSAGES: Too many messages. Please retry later.
API.ERR_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please retry later.
API.ERR_UNSAFE_BASEURL: Channel BaseURL points to a restricted address.
API.ERR_UPSTREAM_STATUS: Upstream service returned an error status.
API.ERR_USER_CAP_REACHED: Platform user cap reached. New registrations are temporarily disabled. Please contact the administrator or try again later.
API.ERR_USER_CHANGED: Target user state changed (banned or role changed). Operation rolled back.
API.ERR_USER_HAS_UNREFUNDED_SUBSCRIPTIONS: User has unrefunded subscriptions. Please handle them in 'Subscriptions' before refunding the top-up.
API.ERR_WRITE_I18N_FILE: Failed to save language pack disk.
API.SUCCESS_ADMIN_RECONFIGURED: Admin alias updated. You will be logged out. Please log in using your new alias.
API.SUCCESS_MODERATION_TEST_OK: The moderation provider is connected and the test text passed moderation.
API.WARN_MODERATION_TEST_FLAGGED: The moderation provider is connected, but harmless test text was flagged. Check model, threshold, or classifier policy.
API.SUCCESS_LANG_DELETED: Language pack completely erased from disk
API.SUCCESS_SANDBOX_CLEARED: Real-name verification complete, sandbox restrictions lifted
API.SUCCESS_SYSTEM_UNLOCKED: Initial setup complete, transferring to dashboard.

BILLING_RULES.TITLE: How is quota deducted?
BILLING_RULES.SUBTITLE: Different models consume quota at different rates: lightweight models deduct less, while Opus / Thinking / high-reasoning models deduct more. The platform will not silently swap your requested model for another model in the background.
BILLING_RULES.STEP_MODEL_VALUE: Light models deduct less; heavy models deduct more
BILLING_RULES.OPEN_PRICING_FULL: Full rules are available on the Pricing page in the left sidebar.
BILLING_RULES.FALLBACK_DEFAULT_HUMAN: Model fallback is disabled by default.
BILLING_RULES.FALLBACK_AUDIT_HUMAN: Bills record both the model you requested and the model actually served.
BILLING_RULES.FALLBACK_OPTIN_HUMAN: Only when you explicitly allow fallback can the platform switch to an available model according to the rules.
BILLING_RULES.THINKING_ENABLED_HUMAN: A request is billed as Thinking use only when thinking / reasoning is explicitly enabled, or the upstream returns reasoning tokens.
BILLING_RULES.THINKING_DISABLED_HUMAN: disabled / none / off / an empty thinking object does not count as Thinking use.
BILLING_RULES.THINKING_AUDIT_HUMAN: Request event details show reasoning tokens and the actual model multiplier for this call.
BILLING_RULES.TECH_RAW: API-equivalent cost converted from public model pricing.
BILLING_RULES.TECH_WEIGHT: The consumption coefficient for this model.
BILLING_RULES.TECH_CHARGED: Final amount deducted from package quota.
BILLING_RULES.TECH_FALLBACK: served_model can change only when fallback is explicitly allowed.
